title: Spec Kitty Skills Manifest
description: Authoritative record of Agent Skills packages written by Spec Kitty into .agents/skills/ on a project. Used for additive install, selective remove, and drift detection.

schema_version.description: Manifest schema version. Incremented when the on-disk layout changes.

entries.description: One record per Spec-Kitty-owned skill package file.

path.description: Path relative to repo root, POSIX-style. Must live under .agents/skills/spec-kitty.<command>/SKILL.md.

content_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the file content as written by the installer.

agents.description: Sorted list of agent keys that installed this entry. The file is physically deleted when the list becomes empty. New shared-root agents added in later missions may extend this enum.

installed_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp at which the entry was first written.

spec_kitty_version.description: Spec Kitty CLI version that wrote the entry (e.g. "3.2.0").
